resources.string: Write the modified Capability Container (CC) to file 1 and the URL template to file 2 on the tag
Please note: when a NTAG424DNA tag is tapped to the NFC reader the action runs without any further confirmation.
Write the Capability Container and URL template
Prepare the tag for NDEF operations
Gives an overview about the tag
Please note: when a NTAG424DNA tag is tapped to the NFC reader the action runs without any further confirmation.
Checks Authentication Scheme (AES/LRP), Keys, File Settings
Please note: when a NTAG424DNA tag is tapped to the NFC reader the action runs without any further confirmation.
Write the default Capability Container (CC) to file 1 and clear the file 2 on the tag. Change the application keys to default and unsets any SDM feature.
Write the URL template for Encrypted SUN
Write the URL template for an Encrypted SUN Message to file 2 on the tag
Please note: when a NTAG424DNA tag is tapped to the NFC reader the action runs without any further confirmation.
Prepare the tag for NDEF operations
Gives an overview about the tag
Write the default Capability Container (CC) to file 1 and clear file 2 on the tag.
Write the Capability Container (CC) to file 1 and an URL template to file 2 on the tag.
